level_description: High Beginner — dormant high school foundation, passive comprehension, disconnected basics

context.goal: Light casual conversation with girlfriend and her family
context.girlfriend_family_background: unknown — default to neutral Latin American Spanish

weak_areas: ver vs vivir (confusing to see vs to live)
notes: Interviewed 2026-03-01. High school Spanish 10+ years ago. Knows 1-10, struggles 11-20. Picks up words in fast speech but loses thread.
whisper_note: Whisper auto-detects language and translates Spanish to English on longer phrases. Single words transcribe correctly. Workaround: credit all Spanish audio answers based on context.
